title: CrownCrawl
description: It is a mod still in development that aims to improve the vanilla experience of the game by adding new bosses and items.
body:
![crowncrawl is the logo of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c2933a6d0b83953c2916faa719026b856be45f2.png)          

CrownCrawl is a Forge mod that expands the world of Minecraft with entirely new creatures inspired by real-life insects, amphibians, and original fantasy designs.

Explore a more dynamic and dangerous environment featuring frogs, flies, snails, and powerful enhanced versions of these mobs. Face unique bosses, discover custom items, and craft special gear with new mechanics.

⚠️ Warning: This mod is meant to be more difficult than standard Minecraft. Be prepared for a tougher survival experience.
💡 Tip: This mod is fully compatible with JEI, which is highly recommended for viewing all crafting recipes in-game.

![All the mobs added by this mod! Including frogs, snails, flies... and their upgraded versions!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/169552d15088f18e73b67e5ba27c0e48ce67b8c2.png)
